mapper.insert: insert into osh_question_answer_user_answer_vote (user_id, answer_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, delete_flag) values (#{userId}, #{answerId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, 0) on duplicate key update delete_flag = 0, update_time = now(), update_by = #{createBy}
mapper.update: update osh_question_answer_answer set vote_count = vote_count + 1 where id = #{answerId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
update osh_question_answer_answer set vote_count = greatest(vote_count - 1, 0) where id = #{answerId} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 0
